text.tspan: through the natural emulsion of yolk, hot starch water, and
rendered guanciale fat. The lecithin in yolks is the magic.
Cream dilutes the deep umami of
guanciale and prevents proper starch binding. It masks, rather than
reveals, what good ingredients already are.
